## Goal

Root quest for all improvements to the quest system itself — the writ type, workflow, skill, tooling, vocabulary, and orientation rituals. Children may be active design threads, CLI prereqs, naming/vocabulary debates, or infrastructure gaps. This root exists so the quest-about-quests work has a stable anchor rather than scattering across the board.
